## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build/CI

## Testing

- [ ] Ran `python test_imports.py`
- [ ] Ran `python -m py_compile app.py launcher.py test_imports.py`
- [ ] Verified app launches locally

## Checklist

- [ ] I reviewed my own changes
- [ ] I updated docs (README or comments) when needed
- [ ] I did not commit local-only files (workbooks, backups, venv, build artifacts)
